subcodes.first_line: O thou who art endowed with insight! Know thou that We have attained unto the Most Exalted Horizon, while they imagine that I am in prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا بصیر فاعلم بانا وردنا فی المنظر الاعلی و الذین یتوهمون انی فی السجن
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
